step.details: Copy contents from lib/db-wishlist.ts with these changes: - Change import: `import { getSql } from "./connection"` (was "./db") - Keep all functions exactly as-is

consumers.consumer: Change: `import { addToWishlist } from "@/lib/db-wishlist"` To: `import { addToWishlist } from "@/lib/db"`

constraints.constraint: No functional changes - pure structural refactoring
Build must pass before deleting original file

task.success_criteria: - lib/db/wishlist.ts created with correct import - All exports added to lib/db/index.ts - Consumer import updated (1 file) - lib/db-wishlist.ts deleted - Build passes

mandatory_final_step.description: Update the feature's status.md file with execution results.
mandatory_final_step.action:
After completing all steps, UPDATE the file: docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/status.md
with: - Date: Get from system (date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") - Prompt: phases/02_migrate_wishlist.xml - Phase: 02 - Migrate Wishlist - Status: completed | partial | blocked - Summary of what was done - Any issues encountered - Next: phases/03_migrate_users.xml

mandatory_commit_step.commit_format: feat(remaining-db-refactoring): phase-02 - Migrate lib/db-wishlist.ts to lib/db/wishlist.ts
mandatory_commit_step.action: 1. Stage: git add lib/db/ app/ docs/prompts/remaining-db-refactoring/ 2. Commit with format above
